channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Quebec Implements Exams for Ontario Truck Drivers to Improve Road Safety
item.description: Quebec has introduced new regulations requiring Ontario truck drivers with less than two years of experience to take practical exams to work in the province. This measure follows a series of collision...

item.title: Two deaths and eight hospitalisations linked to suspected poisoning from spaza snacks in Mpumalanga
item.description: In the community of Klarnet, Mpumalanga, two people died and eight others were hospitalised after allegedly consuming fizzy drinks, snacks, and biscuits from a spaza shop owned by a foreign national. ...

item.title: Capitec BizTalk Event Explores Resilience Strategies for South African Businesses
item.description: The article discusses the Capitec BizTalk event, which focused on helping businesses build resilience during economic uncertainty. Hosted in partnership with Business Day and Arena Events, the first h...

item.title: Landslide at Vaishno Devi Temple Causes Concern Over Safety Measures
item.description: A recent landslide near the Vaishno Devi temple in Jammu and Kashmir has raised concerns about safety protocols and infrastructure resilience. The incident, which occurred during heavy rainfall, resul...

item.title: Grassley's Inquiry Into Kash Patel's Reported Spending Draws Attention to Oversight Concerns
item.description: The article discusses growing scrutiny surrounding FBI Director Kash Patel following reports about his alleged use of private aircraft and expensive government-funded vehicles. During an appearance on...

item.title: Tanzanian Football Giants Yanga and Simba Set for Community Shield Clash on August 12
item.description: Tanzania's top football clubs, Young Africans (Yanga) and Simba SC, are set to renew their historic rivalry in the Community Shield match scheduled for August 12. This encounter marks the official sta...

item.title: SDP Chairman Demands Resignation of Gbajabiamila Over Allegations
item.description: The Social Democratic Party (SDP) National Chairman, Professor Sadiq Gombe, has publicly demanded that Chief of Staff to the President, Femi Gbajabiamila, resign immediately due to allegations of misc...

item.title: Elvis Tribute Artist Wins 2026 Penticton Festival with Talent and Dedication
item.description: Jesse Lamont, a 23-year-old from Regina, unexpectedly found his passion for performing through a family initiative. His older sister Zoe signed him up for a musical theatre program in high school, des...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of the 1984 Supergirl Film: A Look at Its Production and Legacy
item.description: The article delves into the 1984 film *Supergirl*, exploring its production challenges, cast dynamics, and critical reception. Directed by Jeannot Szwarc, the movie faced financial hurdles and mixed r...

item.title: Munnar hosts 'Rain 40' football tournament with 32 teams
item.description: The fourth edition of the 'Rain 40' football penalty shootout tournament will be held in Munnar, Kerala, on August 9 at the Munnar High Altitude Stadium. Organized by Greens Munnar, the event will fea...

item.title: Catholic Bishops Launch New Website to Enhance Evangelization Efforts
item.description: The Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines (CBCP) launched a redesigned website, cbcp.ph, to bolster evangelization through improved communication. This platform serves as a centralized hub f...

item.title: Europe Faces Cooling Challenges Amid Climate Change and Technological Innovation
item.description: As extreme heatwaves increasingly threaten European cities, the demand for air conditioning is surging. However, this trend raises critical environmental concerns due to the energy consumption and emi...

item.title: Saskatoon Storm Causes Power Outages and Sparks Fires
item.description: A severe storm swept through Saskatoon overnight, causing widespread power outages and sparking multiple fires. Wind gusts reached up to 96 km/h, leading to citywide disruptions. Saskatoon Light & Pow...

item.title: Replica Mosque Placed on Loyalist Bonfire in Northern Ireland Sparks Condemnation and Arrest
item.description: A replica of a mosque has been placed atop a large loyalist bonfire in the village of Moygashel, County Tyrone, Northern Ireland, ahead of traditional Eleventh Night commemorations. The structure, bui...

item.title: Steve Bannon and Trump Allegedly Targeted Law Firms with Extortion Scheme
item.description: New court documents allege that former Trump advisor Steve Bannon was a covert operative aiding the White House in an alleged extortion scheme targeting top law firms. The scheme, detailed in filings,...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Bid for Leadership: Labour MPs Nominate Him to Replace Keir Starmer
item.description: The article details the political maneuvering within the UK Labour Party as Andy Burnham, a senior figure, gains significant support from 322 MPs to challenge Keir Starmer for the leadership. Burnham'...

item.title: A Blue Mountains micro-bakery's sweet success
item.description: Romina Gardella, a self-taught baker from Chile, has transformed her roadside micro-bakery, House of Suns, into a local sensation in the Blue Mountains. The bright yellow stall, located near Martin’s ...

item.title: Ennore Dhanasekaran arrested in Chennai after extortion case
item.description: A history-sheeter named Ennore Dhanasekaran was arrested at gunpoint from a star hotel near Guindy in Chennai. The police, acting on instructions from the Avadi City Police Commissioner, surrounded th...

item.title: Tom Hanks' Theatrical Beginnings in the 1970s: A Journey from Bellhop to Hollywood Star
item.description: This article explores Tom Hanks' formative years in the 1970s, tracing his path from a restless teenager working as a bellhop at the Oakland Hilton to a burgeoning theater kid. Before becoming Hollywo...

item.title: Premiership Opening Round Fixtures: Chiefs and Bucs Face Newcomers
item.description: The PSL has released the fixtures for the Betway Premiership opening round, with key teams like Orlando Pirates, Kaizer Chiefs, and Mamelodi Sundowns set to kickstart their campaigns. Pirates will tak...
